'''鈭歵h-b-f-w''' ('''kathabfewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ebulliate|ebulliate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ebulliate|ebulliate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-b-f-w
|-
! Lemma
| kathabfewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithabfewoko|thithabfewoko]] || [[word:jithabfewoko|jithabfewoko]] || [[word:shithabfewoko|shithabfewoko]] || [[word:kithabfewoko|kithabfewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthabfewoko|thuthuthabfewoko]] || [[word:jujuthabfewoko|jujuthabfewoko]] || [[word:shushuthabfewoko|shushuthabfewoko]] || [[word:kukuthabfewoko|kukuthabfewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthabfewoko|thuthabfewoko]] || [[word:juthabfewoko|juthabfewoko]] || [[word:shuthabfewoko|shuthabfewoko]] || [[word:kuthabfewoko|kuthabfewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthabfewoko|thuthabfewoko]] || [[word:juthabfewoko|juthabfewoko]] || [[word:shuthabfewoko|shuthabfewoko]] || [[word:kuthabfewoko|kuthabfewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethabfewoko|thethabfewoko]] || [[word:jethabfewoko|jethabfewoko]] || [[word:shethabfewoko|shethabfewoko]] || [[word:kethabfewoko|kethabfewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothabfewoko|thothothabfewoko]] || [[word:jojothabfewoko|jojothabfewoko]] || [[word:shoshothabfewoko|shoshothabfewoko]] || [[word:kokothabfewoko|kokothabfewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothabfewoko|thothabfewoko]] || [[word:jothabfewoko|jothabfewoko]] || [[word:shothabfewoko|shothabfewoko]] || [[word:kothabfewoko|kothabfewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothabfewoko|thothabfewoko]] || [[word:jothabfewoko|jothabfewoko]] || [[word:shothabfewoko|shothabfewoko]] || [[word:kothabfewoko|kothabfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thabfewoko|th忙thabfewoko]] || [[word:j忙thabfewoko|j忙thabfewoko]] || [[word:sh忙thabfewoko|sh忙thabfewoko]] || [[word:k忙thabfewoko|k忙thabfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathabfewoko|thathathabfewoko]] || [[word:jajathabfewoko|jajathabfewoko]] || [[word:shashathabfewoko|shashathabfewoko]] || [[word:kakathabfewoko|kakathabfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathabfewoko|thathabfewoko]] || [[word:jathabfewoko|jathabfewoko]] || [[word:shathabfewoko|shathabfewoko]] || [[word:kathabfewoko|kathabfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathabfewoko|thathabfewoko]] || [[word:jathabfewoko|jathabfewoko]] || [[word:shathabfewoko|shathabfewoko]] || [[word:kathabfewoko|kathabfewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathabfewithi|shathabfewithi]] || [[word:shathabfewiji|shathabfewiji]] || [[word:shathabfewishi|shathabfewishi]] || [[word:shathabfewiki|shathabfewiki]]
